Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rosegold continent]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — House Arelius is on the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Rosegold continent is ruled by Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Reigan Shen is the Emperor of the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Rosegold continent has western plains where Reigan Shen's pride was born.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — House Arelius used to rule over most of the Rosegold continent.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Therian Nills was born on the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Rosegold continent is ruled by a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Tiberian Arelius was the fallen ruler over half of the Rosegold continent.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Malice's subordinates are traveling to the Rosegold continent.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Rosegold continent is suspected to belong to House Shen.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Rosegold continent contains a distant branch of the labyrinth.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Rosegold continent is the center of human power.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
